input_redacted_verbatim: SELECT intentKey, COUNT(*) AS successfulSideEffectCount FROM side_effect_journal WHERE run_id='idemgate-prod-us-east-1-20260610T084215Z-a91c7e2' AND status='SUCCEEDED' GROUP BY intentKey HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
expected_behavior: Safety query returns zero intents with more than one success; liveness query returns zero lost accepted-success intents; non-success terminal intents have zero unexpected silent successes.
actual_result: Safety PASS: maximum successful side effects per intent was one. Liveness PASS: all 3 accepted success-terminal intents had exactly one outcome and zero were lost. No rejected, compensated, or repair intent had an unexpected success.
